name: Sculplings
short_description: A creature-collecting roguelike where every monster is sculpted in real clay and brought to life! Collect and battle a random assortment of hand-sculpted monsters in order to become the #1 Sculpling Champion!
detailed_description:
Welcome to the world of Sculplings! Here, trainers collect monsters in order to become the #1 Sculpling Champion!

Sculplings is a mashup of roguelikes with traditional monster fighter games! Each run has players collecting and battling a random assortment of hand-sculpted monsters in the hopes of reaching the Sculpling Champions!

                 

                               

Sculplings features a simple-yet-deep battle system similar to other monster battlers! A variety of different monster types and moves must be used if you have any hope of becoming a Sculpling champion!

                   

                           

Every monster, every item, every blade of grass is completely hand sculpted and scanned into the game! We’ve made over 300 sculptures to help bring the unique world of Sculplings to life, with plenty more on the way!

                 

                             

Each run of Sculplings features a new set of randomized paths. Players must strategically choose which path to go down to have the best chance of reaching the Champion’s Arena. In addition, each run features random monsters and a variety of zones players can enter, each with its own set of unique Sculplings to capture!

                

                             

Sculplings features over 100 unique, hand-sculpted monsters to discover and collect, each with their own strategies and playstyles. The trick is to discover which collection of Sculplings will give you the best chances of reaching the end!

                    

                                  

Collect ‘Pins’ during your runs to add all sorts of passive benefits! The balance between the monsters you choose to have on your team and the items you get could be the key to victory!

FEATURES:

  • Over 100 hand sculpted monsters to collect and battle!

  • Over 30 unique passive items to aid you on your runs

  • 5 unique environments to explore, each with their own monsters and battles

  • Over 15 unique bosses to battle

Frequent new content

Imagine a monster battle game where new monsters are CONSTANTLY being added! Our goal is to push out new monsters monthly so that you always have exciting new content to look forward to!

reviews.review_text:
Tried out this game on the v1.00 release and I think it's a fun little experience. The claymation is really good and nostalgic for me. It gets what makes monster tamer games fun: just silly little guys doing ridiculous things. The writing I personally find quite amusing. There are some insane things you can do to break it wide open and I see a lot of potential in what it can offer as an experience.

For the roguelike aspect: The story requires you to complete multiple runs so this isn't one in which you can see everything in just one run if you got lucky. It also has cosmetic collectibles and the pins, which give you permanent bonuses for a run, can be selected as a starting pin for future runs, so there's some degree of permanent progress being made across runs.

That being said, it's still missing some polish that you would expect for a game that went out of Early Access. Some notable ones include some settings not persisting properly, and some user feedback when you save and quit the game. A couple (unintentional) typos here and there. The enemy miniboss/boss AI also sometimes bugs out and switches to the current Sculpling so they effectively just waste a turn doing nothing. Not a dealbreaker to me, but if these bother you it might be worth waiting for a bit.

Hopefully some of these issues get addressed in the future, but as of writing this I like what I've seen so far.
A cute little roguelite Pokemon-like game.  A little clunky, but I love the sense of humor and the creatures are quite charming, something a lot of creature collectors fail at!

this game is already so addicting! obsessed the literally handmade sculplings, and the dialog has me smiling all the time. it’s such a cozy lil battle game. a perfect escape from the horrors! we will persist. 

I have been playing easily on the steam deck with the lil track pad. I added shortcuts to the basic layout it recommends for the keyboard (L4) and for screenshots (R4). for anyone who is hesitant about the deck, don’t even worry about a thing. 

also very honored to be in the game (it’s me, explorer evyn!) I’m just happy to be here. I even paid for this game, that’s how excited I am for it. so you should too!! it’s well worth it
This is a very good, very fun monster battler rougelike. It has a lot of potential to be even better than it already is, which it is fantastic
